reviews.comment:
Hay un antes y un después de los pebetes de jamón y queso. No podemos decir nada de la estación de servicio por que no hemos cargado combustible acá, pero los sanguches de jamón y queso son razón suficiente para volver a parar. Super recomendables

(Translated by Google)
There's a before and after the ham and cheese sandwiches. We can't say anything about the gas station because we haven't filled up there, but the ham and cheese sandwiches are reason enough to stop back. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlN3VyTnN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
A ver... debo decir que la Estación de servicio no dice nada y los baños son deplorables peeeeero allí venden unos SÁNDWICHES FAMOSOS y tienen super ganada esa fama. Los panes especiales y los fiambres Caseros. No les puedo explicar la exquisitez. El de matambre es casero el mismo y le ponen una cantidad de relleno indescriptible. Con un sándwich comen dos seguro. SUPER RECOMENDABLE.

(Translated by Google)
Okay... I have to say, the gas station itself is pretty basic and the bathrooms are awful, but they sell some seriously FAMOUS SANDWICHES, and they've definitely earned their reputation. The bread is special and the cold cuts are homemade. I can't even begin to describe how delicious they are. The matambre sandwich is homemade, and they put an indescribable amount of filling in it. One sandwich is definitely enough for two people. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlejZqR1V3EAE

reviews.comment:
ACA Gorchs es una parada “técnica” casi obligada si va por ruta 3. Entre Monte y Las Flores.
Sándwiches inmensos. Súper cargados. Hechos en el momento. Esto es un SÁNDWICH HONESTO.
Acá se le hace desde hace más de 50 años honor al sándwich y al cliente.

(Translated by Google)
ACA Gorchs is a practically obligatory "technical" stop if you're traveling on Route 3. Between Monte and Las Flores.
Huge sandwiches. Super loaded. Made to order. This is an HONEST SANDWICH.
Here, they've been honoring the sandwich and the customer for over 50 years.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNleTY3TGVREAE
